text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to deliver some<n>important training
paperwork, when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... My stomach was grumblingall class. All that thinking is probablyto blame.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. But that's normal for you, isn't<n>it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, you think so? I don't know, I<n>feel like it's
a little louder today...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Want to come with me for<n>some
ramen?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I appreciate the offer, I do. But, I can't<n>today...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Are you... feeling tired? You don't<n>seem like
yourself today...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, don't be silly. I'm always like<n>this.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm simply not in the mood for ramen<n>today,
that's all. Maybe another time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, th-that's fine. It's just—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm down for some ramen!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hang on, El! What if Grass—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Spe! Spe! Don't poke the hornet's<n>nest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El? Did you say something?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Eek! Nope, not a thing! Come on, let's<n>get to
slurping!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But we can't just leave her<n>like this.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's fine, it's fine! See you around,<n>Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I expected El to say<n>something, but even
Spe was on to<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
How awfully perceptive of them,<n>hehe. I guess
they really are looking<n>out for me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...I knew it. Merely increasing the<n>length of my
training sessions does<n>nothing but wear me out.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I need to improve my baseline<n>endurance and
consider what's<n>efficient...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No more going easy on myself. I need<n>to get
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The strict self-discipline and passion<n>that Grass
Wonder hides from those<n>around her are the fuel
that drives her<n>to grow.
